_comment: Synthetic-only JWT claim fixtures for auth-gateway tests. No real keys, issuers, or customer data. Signing keys are generated at test time; see tests/helpers/jwt.ts.
notes: absoluteFarFutureExp is 2100-01-01T00:00:00Z so jwt.verify never treats fixtures as wall-clock expired; the verifier's own expiry branch is exercised via the injected clock.
